ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election cycle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the election took place */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the election occurred */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "total_precincts" INTEGER /* Total number of precincts in the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general, special) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the election results are final */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who participated in the election */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of registered voters in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office or position */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office or position */,
  "district" TEXT /* District or region the office represents */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of office (e.g., state, local, federal) */,
  "office_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the office or position */,
  "is_elected_by_popular_vote" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the office is elected by popular vote or appointed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" TEXT /* ID of the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Educational background of the candidate */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* Link to the candidate's campaign website */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the party's official website */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Political ideology of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election cycle */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* ID of the office or position */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "precincts_reported" INTEGER /* Number of precincts that have reported results */,
  "total_precincts" INTEGER /* Total number of precincts in the election */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "vote_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "is_winner" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the candidate won the election */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the candidate in the election */,
  "margin_of_victory" REAL /* Margin of victory (in votes or percentage) */,
  "precincts_reporting_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of precincts that have reported results */,
  "ballots_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of ballots cast in the precincts where the candidate received votes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
